description: Valid N=2 GuestInput for the s1/03 guest (executor gate). The two notes (note0 @ leaf 0, note1 @ leaf 1) are real PoC-derived vectors from golden/poc_vectors.json; both belong to the SAME depth-3 pool tree, so their Merkle membership holds against merkle_root_le below. All field elements are 32-byte LITTLE-ENDIAN hex (matching the PoC scalar_to_bytes); amount is a plain u128; recipient is an opaque 32-byte address (0x-hex). This file mirrors zk_core::witness::GuestInput exactly.
provenance: note crypto + Merkle paths copied verbatim from golden/poc_vectors.json (generated by stellar-private-payments prover::crypto + circuits::core::merkle; see .sdd/poc-extraction-map.md §6). Recipients are demo addresses chosen here (NOT from the PoC) — they are opaque payout targets, not cryptographic inputs.
